title: campanula intermedia
intro: Campanula intermedia, commonly known as Canterbury bells, is a flowering plant species in the bellflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula intermedia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Campanula intermedia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine.
